node.statement: N1.5 (CRUX: j:(A,•) -> (j(A),∘⋆) is an exact unital order-isometric Jordan isomorphism onto a ∘⋆-closed subset of B_sa). For a,b in A: j(a)∘⋆j(b) = (1/2)(j(a)*j(b)+j(b)*j(a)) = Ftilde((1/2)(j(a)j(b)+j(b)j(a))) [Choi-Effros symmetrized product X∘⋆Y=Ftilde(XY) symmetrized] = Ftilde(j(a)∘j(b)) [∘ is the ambient Jordan product (1/2)(XY+YX) on B(H)_sa/D_sa] = Ftilde(j(a∘b)) [j is a Jordan homomorphism: j(a∘b)=j(a)∘j(b), GT-hyp] = j(P(a∘b)) [N1.2: Ftilde j = j P, applied to a∘b in B(H)_sa] = j(a•b) [a•b:=P(a∘b), def-near-fixed-algebra]. So j(a•b)=j(a)∘⋆j(b): j intertwines • with ∘⋆ EXACTLY. By N1.4, j(a)∘⋆j(b)=j(a•b) in j(A), so j(A) is closed under ∘⋆ (a Jordan subset of (B_sa,∘⋆)). j is unital (j(1_A)=j(I)=I_B=unit of B_sa, GT-hyp) and order-isometric (||j(a)||=||a||, and j preserves the cone since it is an order embedding into D_sa, GT-hyp). Hence j is an EXACT unital order-isometric Jordan isomorphism of (A,•) onto (j(A),∘⋆).
